message:
test(readme): pin DType + NullKind + CategoricalMetadata serde shapes

Third in the serde-shape-pinning series (fd90.38 Scalar, fd90.39
IndexLabel + ValidityMask). Three more documented serializable types:

DType (unit-variant enum, rename_all=snake_case) — all 8 variants
asserted on bare-string output:
- Int64 → "int64", Float64 → "float64", Utf8 → "utf8", Bool → "bool",
  Null → "null", Categorical → "categorical",
  Timedelta64 → "timedelta64", Sparse → "sparse"

NullKind (rename_all=snake_case) — all 3 variants asserted:
- Null → "null", NaN → "na_n", NaT → "na_t"

CategoricalMetadata (struct, default field names) — composite
shape with nested Scalar values:
{"categories":[{"kind":"utf8","value":"low"},
               {"kind":"utf8","value":"high"}],"ordered":true}

The composite assertion doubles as a regression guard for fd90.38's
inner Scalar tagged-enum shape.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.40.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
